description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating black and light gray horizontal stripes. The stripes are evenly spaced and run parallel across the entire top face, giving it a visually striking, modern appearance. The sides of the block are solid black, with no visible texture or pattern, creating a strong contrast with the patterned top. The block appears to be made of a dense, solid material, likely stone or concrete, with a slightly rough, matte finish on the top surface. There are no visible engravings, markings, or interactive components. The overall form is geometric and regular, suggesting it is designed for use as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment.
description: A rectangular stone block with a striped black and gray top and solid black sides, featuring a modern, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped top surface and solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the stripes and the solid black side face.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the striped top and solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the striped top and solid black side face.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or placed on a leveled surface
attribute_weathering_pattern: Minor surface speckling and discoloration suggest some exposure to the elements, but no significant erosion or chipping is visible.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
